name: Shalmii
text: Moon. Halt. The Moonwake line holds until I know what follows your anger.

name: Moon
text: Selkie follows it. That is enough.

name: Shalmii
text: A soldier who cannot name her objective mistakes momentum for purpose.

name: Moon
text: My purpose is to bring her home.

name: Shalmii
text: Home by whose command? Carry that promise without using it as a hammer on her.
